chunks.title: Arrival at Sinai
chunks.reason: Describes the Israelites' journey and encampment before the mountain.

chunks.title: Covenant Proposal and Acceptance
chunks.reason: Contains God's offer of covenant status and the people's verbal agreement.

chunks.title: Preparation Instructions
chunks.reason: Details the specific commands for purification and boundaries before the event.

chunks.title: Theophany on Sinai
chunks.reason: Narrates the dramatic arrival of God with sensory details and Moses ascending.

chunks.title: Warning to the People
chunks.reason: Records the exchange regarding the boundaries between God, Moses, and the people.
